positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic, leaping wolf howling at a vibrant crescent moon. The wolf should be rendered in a silhouette style with deep midnight blue and charcoal gray accents, contrasted against a warm, gradient watercolor sunset background of burnt orange, magenta, and gold. Geometric, celestial elements like subtle constellations and stylized mountain ranges should frame the subject. Central composition, high contrast, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Art Deco meets modern folk art, clean lines, vector quality, dramatic lighting.
negative: blurry, noise, grainy, artifact, text, watermark, signature, logo, low detail, worst quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, out of frame, childish, messy, oil paint, watercolor bleed
